case_title: DUBBIN, SHAYNA VS HASID, JUDITH EL C/O MIRACLE TRAVEL & TOURS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,605.00 FILED BY DUBBIN, SHAYNA AS TO DEFENDANT HASID, JUDITH EL C/O MIRACLE TRAVEL & TOURS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUBBIN, SHAYNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASID, JUDITH EL C/O MIRACLE TRAVEL & TOURS $1,605.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,620.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HASID, JUDITH EL C/O MIRACLE TRAVEL & TOURS HEARING SET FOR APR-20-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-20-1995, DENIED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HASID, JUDITH EL C/O MIRACLE TRAVEL & TOURS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23962, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUBBIN, SHAYNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HASID, JUDITH EL C/O MIRACLE TRAVEL & TOURS PLTFF TO PAY DEFEND. $68 COSTS. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23962 ON 9-7-95. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
